title: Locked On
description: Client-Side mod that allows you to lock you camera onto any entity!
body:
### Namecorp LLC's Camera Lock On Mod
> Client-Side Mod for 1.21.x

_Locked On_ works by calculating the needed yaw and pitch of the player based off the position between the player and the locked target. The player's camera angles are then moved to these calculated angles.

The mod also displays the current distance between the player and the locked entity on the HUD!

> Press [V] by default to target the entity you are facing

Complete with configuration via _Mod Menu_.
